original_image_tags: The document is the reverse side of a typewritten page. The text from the front side is faintly visible in reverse through the thin paper. A large, irregular black shape obscures the bottom left corner. A small, black, circular punch hole or mark is visible near the bottom right.

elements.description: Multiple red stamped ink markings. The top stamp reads 'TRANSMITTED' with a handwritten number '38' above a date stamp 'JAN 9 4 08 PM '50'. Below this is a stamped location 'LOWRY FLIGHT SERVICE CENTER' with a faint handwritten signature over it. There is also a faint, reversed purple stamp visible at the bottom of the page, with legible mirrored text including 'ODENLER' and 'FLIGHT SERVICE CENTER'.
